_note: Named login sessions. Copy to testData/users.json (gitignored) and fill real credentials. Sessions are logged in lazily on first use (fixtures/auth.ts + the createLoginPage factory) and cached to .auth/<key>.json; select one in a test with test.use({ session: '<key>' }). 'demoUser' drives the runnable saucedemo.com example (public creds) — delete it for your app.
